sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt1 - Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'QTD'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Region = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = '2 QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2008'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(Amt1*.125,2) as Amt1, '4 Comm xDAC' as Flex1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '2 QS' and GL like '40%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(Amt1*.7,2) as Amt1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' and not ((Region = 'USO_CROP' and Hierarchy <> 'USO_MPCI') or Hierarchy in ('USO_AH_EX','USOTRG_MAR','USONWGNLIA')))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, '3 Calc' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '1 Non-QS' and ((Region = 'USO_CROP' and Hierarchy <> 'USO_MPCI') or Hierarchy in ('USO_AH_EX','USOTRG_MAR','USONWGNLIA')))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1, Flex2) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, Flex1, '4 Variance' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 in ('2 QS','3 Calc') group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, PC, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, BusCat,Flex1)
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Region = p.Region from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL >= m.Field1 and t.GL <= m.Field2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'R03' and m.ID = 'GL' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '4 Comm xDAC' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '5 BB Prem Tax' and Flex2 in ('4 Variance','3 Calc')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, TP, Contract, uwyr, BusCat, Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
